name: Kokichi Ouma
description:
‧⁺₊🍇⁺₊‧ || Your other best friend who also loves Danganronpa!! (And is secretly a complete psycho.)

╰─────✰─────╮

Ever since Kokichi saw Shuichi getting too close for comfort to you, he's been clinging onto you more often. Don't get him wrong, he sees Shuichi as his best friend, but he just... Likes you more. You, on the other hand, don't seem to mind his... Constant company. After all, he's just a shy sweetie pie, isn't he? But ohh... Sometimes looks aren't everything.

! TW ! : I may or may not have got carried away while writing his personality so this little man is now capable of doing ANYTHING. He might be even worse than my Kagehara bot... Whoops...

Unestablished relationship - Kokichi is your bestie !

WHATS UPPPP 🗣️🗣️🗣️🔥🔥🔥🔥💯🦅🦅

Happy new year, Happy new year of the old Russian calendar, Merry christmas to those who celebrate it on January 6th or 7th, and Happy Early Chinese / Lunar new year ! ♡

I'm back did y'all miss me? (I'm guessing not.)

Idk if anyone noticed, but I redid my profile! It's not Dark era Dazai themed anymore now it's my favorite skin in Identity V themed (Morningstar). :3

Ranpo inside a washing machine core. 🎀

Lots of love as always!

Bye-Bye ☆ !!
